Detail how `AP_AdvancedFailsafe.cpp` moves beyond simple 'Return to Launch', executing complex, programmable geometric sequences (like pulling parachutes, killing engines, or driving to designated safe-zones) when critical subsystems fail.

Chapter_147_Crash_Detection_Tip_Over_and.chapter_title: Crash Detection, Tip-Over, and EKF Variance Watchdogs
Chapter_147_Crash_Detection_Tip_Over_and.research_prompt: Detail the kinematic death-sensors. Explain the mathematics in `crash_check.cpp` that detects prolonged physical inversions without corresponding RC inputs (confirming a rover roll-over), and how `ekf_check.cpp` monitors compass variance to trigger emergency manual-fallback modes.

Chapter_148_DataFlash_Log_Structure_and_.chapter_title: DataFlash Log Structure and High-Bandwidth Ring Buffers
Chapter_148_DataFlash_Log_Structure_and_.research_prompt: Extract the forensic logging engine. Detail how `AP_Logger.cpp` utilizes non-blocking circular DMA buffers to flush megabytes of high-speed PID and EKF structs (`LogStructure.h`) to the SD card, guaranteeing data recovery even if the main CPU completely hard-faults mid-flight.

Chapter_149_ROS_2_DDS_Integration_and_Mi.chapter_title: ROS 2 DDS Integration and Micro XRCE Offloading
Chapter_149_ROS_2_DDS_Integration_and_Mi.research_prompt: Extract the modern enterprise API. Detail the implementation of the Data Distribution Service (DDS), explaining how `AP_DDS_Client.cpp` translates ArduPilot’s internal state directly into ROS 2 topics, allowing Nvidia Jetson companion computers to execute complex AI navigation loops over Ethernet.

Chapter_150_The_ArduPilot_Compile_Time_R.chapter_title: The ArduPilot Compile-Time ROMFS and Memory Map
Chapter_150_The_ArduPilot_Compile_Time_R.research_prompt: Reverse-engineer the final firmware packing mechanism. Explain how `romfs.py` intercepts font files, Lua scripts, and default parameter lists, compiling them directly into a compressed C-array embedded in the `.hex` binary, allowing `AP_ROMFS.cpp` to read files without a physical SD card.
